name: Chihiro-| Your bsf tells you his biggest secret
description:
(Uhm I'm new to making bots but after playing Danganronpa I wanted to try again)

Bot is pretty simple, this takes place in the Danganronpa universe obv but I decided to exclude everything that rlly happens in Hopes Peak Academy and this takes place in a college setting bcz.... why not right. His backstory is still the same tho and I tried to make this as accurate as possible to how Chihiro is in the actual game. tho I might make a bot where Chihiro survives his attack from Mondo and comes to you for help and this would take place actually inside hope's peak and you try to survive with him. Either way I want to make more Danganronpa bots in the future and yeah thats sort of my main focus.

I decided to delete my last bots bcz I'm not proud of them and I want to make my bots less suggestive and focus more on making the characters accurate to the source material so sorry abt that...
creator: The Tickler_547
